title: v0.0.0
description: Project Skeleton & CI Setup. Basic Maven structure, pom-validator, and GitHub Actions.

title: v0.1.0
description: Playwright Core & First Test. Introduction of Playwright, TestNG, and TC_001 on demoqa.com.

title: v0.2.0
description: Logging & Config Management. Implementing Log4j2 and environment configuration readers (Properties/YAML).

title: v0.3.0
description: Page Object Model Architecture. Creating BasePage, locators strategy, and reusable action methods.

title: v0.4.0
description: Data-Driven Framework Setup. Integrating Excel/JSON data providers using Apache POI/Jackson for TestNG.

title: v0.5.0
description: Advanced Playwright Features. Implementing Network Interception, API Mocking, and Authentication state persistence.

title: v0.6.0
description: Visual Regression Testing. Integrating Playwright's visual comparison tools and screenshot capture strategies.

title: v0.7.0
description: Cross-Browser & Parallel Execution. Configuring TestNG for parallel runs across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

title: v0.8.0
description: TestNG Listeners & Retry Logic. Implementing ITestListener and IRetryAnalyzer for robust failure handling.

title: v0.9.0
description: Allure Reporting & Dashboard. Setting up Allure listeners, custom attachments (screenshots/traces on failure).

title: v1.0.0
description: First Stable Master Release. Final code polish, README documentation, and full pipeline execution.
